methods.method_name: Pollen Source Richness and Similarity Analysis
methods.description: This method involves comparing the richness of pollen sources between different areas and verifying the adequacy of sampling efforts. It uses extrapolation curves to estimate the total number of expected pollen types and employs the Renkonen index to determine the similarity in pollen source utilization between areas.

steps.description: Construct extrapolation curves based on the samples using the program EstimateS 9.1.0.
steps.searchable_summary: use EstimateS 9.1.0 to construct extrapolation curves for pollen source richness

steps.description: Determine similarity in pollen source utilization using the Renkonen index.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Renkonen index for pollen source similarity
inputs: pollen source data from two areas

methods.method_name: Food-Niche Breadth and Pollen Source Analysis
methods.description: This method evaluates the food-niche breadth and differences in pollen source abundance using statistical tests. It also assesses the influence of specific pollen types on the analysis results.

steps.description: Evaluate food-niche breadth using the one-sample t test of Hutcheson with PAST 2:13 program.
steps.searchable_summary: perform one-sample t test using PAST 2:13 to evaluate food-niche breadth

steps.description: Verify differences in relative abundance of pollen sources using chi-square tests.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct chi-square tests for pollen source abundance

steps.description: Repeat analyses excluding Byrsonima pollen type to assess its influence.
steps.searchable_summary: repeat statistical analyses excluding Byrsonima pollen

methods.description: This method involves the quantitative analysis of pollen samples by counting pollen grains and calculating indices for niche breadth and uniformity.

steps.description: Divide each slide into four quadrants and count approximately 100 pollen grains per quadrant.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen grains in quadrants on slides

steps.description: Calculate niche breadth using the Shannon-Wiener index.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Shannon-Wiener index for niche breadth

steps.description: Determine uniformity of pollen types using the Pielou evenness index.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Pielou evenness index for pollen uniformity

methods.description: This method classifies pollen types based on anther type and pollen grain size, using literature information.

steps.description: Classify pollen types into poricidal and non-poricidal based on literature.
steps.searchable_summary: classify pollen types by anther type using literature

steps.description: Classify pollen types by grain size into small and medium categories.
steps.searchable_summary: classify pollen types by grain size
